title: Senior Data Scientist
description: Lead the development and deployment of machine learning models that drive business decisions. Work with cross-functional teams to translate business problems into ML solutions. Experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow, feature engineering, and MLOps practices required.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Build and scale web applications used by millions of users. You'll own both frontend and backend systems, working with React, Node.js, and AWS. Strong TypeScript skills and experience with PostgreSQL required.

title: DevOps / Platform Engineer
description: Design, build, and maintain CI/CD pipelines, Kubernetes clusters, and cloud infrastructure on AWS. You'll collaborate with development teams to ensure scalable and reliable deployments.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Build production ML systems at scale. You'll create efficient training pipelines, optimize model serving, and implement MLOps best practices. Experience with distributed training and model optimization required.

title: Backend Engineer (Python/Go)
description: Build high-performance APIs and microservices for financial applications processing millions of transactions. Deep knowledge of database optimization, caching, and async programming required.

title: Product Manager - AI Products
description: Drive product strategy for AI-powered consumer products. Work with engineering, design, and data science teams. Experience with data analysis and understanding of ML concepts essential.
